flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at River Valley Community College fell 44% between 2006 and 2009 (23.7% → 13.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at River Valley Community College fell 40% between 2021 and 2024 (68.6% → 41.4%).
